title: OpenCosmos Alisio Extension
description: STAC OpenCosmos Alisio Extension for Alisio payload processing metadata. Applied to items produced from the Alisio payload.

oneOf.$comment: This is the schema for STAC Items.

opencosmos:session_id.title: Session ID
opencosmos:session_id.description: Unique identifier for the image acquisition session, generated by the payload.

opencosmos:alisio:mode.title: Mode
opencosmos:alisio:mode.description: Acquisition mode used by the Alisio payload. The value "None" is used when no mode was reported.
